---
layout: default
title: "Parliament Monsoon Session Disruptions and Legislative Agenda"
date: 2026-07-22T06:07:50.579881+00:00
summary: "Parliament faces repeated adjournments amid Opposition protests over the NEET paper leak, while the government moves to increase Supreme Court judge strength"
run_time_ist: "11:37AM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 11:37AM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Parliamentary proceedings:</strong> Both Houses were adjourned amid Opposition uproar, while the government introduced the Supreme Court (Number of Judges) Amendment Bill, 2026, to address judicial backlogs.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitgFBVV95cUxPTUMwRkczRDNMOV9LM1FNc1Fld20tT1R4Qzc0X0JQdDNXeXE0cGJiZy1MM3ZIMXNwTjFsdzRSdTdFNGRMb1pjQ3Vya0Flajg4S2NkZmhxanhKTjdkdVFsanBJX2RPLWpYRVliRmRtYUpKLXdXUDdNeHRGbXBNWjVuV0hLZkxUSk81V0NXRVZtbEZKUWhtUmlDMmhNZ2FuWHJQOERjUjNQS0htRDE3eUNBcnFKNW5Idw?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I8</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Political tensions:</strong> The INDIA bloc held floor leader meetings to coordinate strategy, while the AAP accused the Congress of colluding with the BJP during protests near the Prime Minister&#x27;s residence.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I4</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMingFBVV95cUxOcml5NnltNzlsenRqQU1UN1BtZE00Y2R3SjQ4YUc5a3gxdjZCTm5lMG1QQXg3SGMzZ2dMQy1JTkhOdUlQdXEzQXFsUzNyaGtlUDdyMmdCUGJUeDd2bmxmaXZ1Z2xUU21tRHkyYXNVRHN3VEF4ZlA1YnpUTmRIWDV1ck0wSEswQ3FCSmxBcmRBYVJPRVpmR0tkVGNlX0k1Zw?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I5</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I7</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Election and legal updates:</strong> The government rescinded an incorrect Rajya Sabha election notification, and a Delhi court granted interim bail to an accused in the Parliament security breach case.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I6</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I11</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Education protests:</strong> Congress MPs and leaders staged a black-clad protest at Parliament demanding the resignation of the Union Education Minister over the NEET paper leak, a move the BJP dismissed as political exploitation of students.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W1</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMivwFBVV95cUxPMTJ4cnJYRjdhRUg2ZHJWeVNIV0NCYXlLUUtBUy13WlFGV2wwMVlfbzk5eVR1eXRaWGJtWFhFd080czlDemFYYS1OUXhFd1lfRGZzcjJ5SzRUMHRHSUxLQ1E2RHZ6bVpEQUFDaV9sRDlTb08yWWtjMDlQbjBfY1E5STlZTl81QVZwZW1pUk9HekpGc08yaHZqeWc1MGFna19MRzQ2MWZSWkNJZkxGMWx3T3ZvcWt3akExVnFxR1pERQ?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W2</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W3</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiugFBVV95cUxPcDZwdWY2UDdDbjdpS191cmIyZjZHVGltSzc0UHFHZDdIQktIOElWa2N3YmRvNGs1Sk9iR2UtWFNNSTJQY2RBWDlTNURIQ3dTRHhnMm9Fa3BmT3UtZ1JFbXNsVDFhdXhDQlk2MFJxenJRbjIxR0NsVlEzRnR2cnozblk2OFNlc0gyNmdQUWlDZF9zMnFOT2hpZ3REa20xaTlZZlBPMEJoeVcyOU9UQlRiM0d3YXktaHEzbkE?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W7</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W11</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W12</a></span></li>
</ul>
